title: Aircraft pilot performs evasive maneuvers after detecting UFO just 2,500 feet away [2015]

text_preview: JUNE 17, 2015. At 8h52pm, a pilot with an aircraft 129 km from Recife, capital of Pernambuco, was alerted by the TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) of his plane that an object was dangerously close to his aircraft moving back and forth. According to the pilot’s descriptions, the visibility and flight conditions were “CAVOK” (Ceiling and Visibility Okay). The report wrote by the COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] brings the following observations made by the pilot: “Hotel traffic [a military codename for UFO] viewed only at TCAS 2,500 feet below the observer.
summary: Pilot 129 km from Recife performed evasive maneuvers after TCAS detected a UFO 2,500 ft below making rapid lateral movements on 17 Jun 2015.
